leadText: Shadow Blast (Japanese: ダークブラスト Dark Blast) is one of several Shadow moves available only in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness. Like other Shadow moves, it is forgotten and replaced with another move once the Pokémon is purified. It is the signature move of Shadow Lugia.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Shadow Blast is a Shadow version of Aeroblast . It deals damage and has an increased critical hit ratio. As Shadow Pokémon cannot be traded, and since Pokémon Contests do not exist in Pokémon XD: Gale of Darkness, Shadow Blast cannot be used in Contests.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description XD A wicked blade of air is formed using a shadowy aura.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Despite being based on Aeroblast , Shadow Blast will turn into Psycho Boost upon Shadow Lugia's purification . Although Shadow Blast has the appearance of a special move , it is a physical move because Aeroblast was also a physical move in Generation III . This move is similar in concept to Aeroblast+ , the signature move of Apex Shadow Lugia in Pokémon GO . Both are improved variants of Aeroblast exclusive to a specific individual Shadow Pokémon specimen.
